Before Messi & Ronaldo, there was KING GEORGE! 👑

George Weah's 1995 Ballon d'Or wasn't just historic, it was a phenomenon. That solo goal for Milan? Pure, unadulterated power and grace from an African legend. He redefined what a striker could be. Unplayable.

Lamine Yamal is a creative machine for Barcelona, currently leading the La Liga assist charts with a stunning 11 assists!

Think modern defence is revolutionary? Nope! Go back to the 60s. Helenio Herrera's Catenaccio at Inter Milan wasn't just parking the bus, it was an ART FORM! Four-man defence, libero, man-marking masterclass. They called it 'The Chain' for a reason. ABSOLUTELY UNBREAKABLE!

Lamine Yamal scores Barcelona's opener against Celta Vigo... but then is forced off with an injury! 💔 What a bittersweet moment for the young star as Barça hold a 1-0 lead. Wishing him a speedy recovery! #LamineYamal #Barça #LaLiga #Football

Barcelona scrape a 1-0 win over Celta Vigo! Pedri was immense, but injury worries continue to overshadow the victory after Lamine Yamal's early exit. Is the title race taking its toll? #LaLiga #Barça #Pedri #LamineYamal

Alright, serious question for the old heads: Who had the most mind-blowing individual league season?

R9, 96/97 Barca: 34 goals in 37 La Liga games. Just utterly DEMOLISHED defenses. Unprecedented.
Thierry Henry, 03/04 Invincibles: 30 goals in 38 PL games. Pure elegance, clinical perfection.

Ronaldo's raw power vs. Henry's finesse. One just felt more... unstoppable. Discuss. 👇

#FootballFacts #Legends #R9 #Henry

The PL's GREATEST midfield goalscorer? Many say Scholes, but the numbers tell a different story! Steven Gerrard bagged 120 Premier League goals from midfield. Paul Scholes? A still brilliant 107. Different roles, yes, but Gerrard's final third impact was undeniable. Who delivered more often when it truly mattered? #LFC #MUFC #PLHistory
